sub_modules.bandpass_fir_coeffs: Purely combinational coefficient bank that hard-codes the exact 101 signed 16-bit FIR coefficients and exposes them as a flattened vector.
sub_modules.bandpass_fir_mac: Purely combinational multiply-accumulate block. It multiplies the flattened signed sample window by the flattened signed coefficient vector and accumulates into a 64-bit signed sum.
sub_modules.bandpass_fir_quantize: Purely combinational fixed-point output scaler. It performs the arithmetic right shift by 15 bits and truncates to the configured output width.
